name: prts
description: PRTS — local-first personal AI assistant inspired by Arknights & OpenClaw

scripts.dev: concurrently -n dashboard,gateway,agent -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter gateway dev" "python -m uv run --project apps/agent prts-agent"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter dashboard build && pnpm --filter gateway build
